# 🚨 Important: All pull requests MUST target the `develop` branch  
❗ **Do NOT open PRs directly into `master`** — they will be closed automatically.

---

## 📝 Description

Please provide a clear and concise description of what this PR changes.

---

## 🔧 Type of Change
Please check the relevant option(s):

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ✨ New core widgets
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 🧹 Maintenance / Cleanup
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement
- [ ] 🔥 Hotfix

---

## 🧪 Testing

Describe how this change was tested.

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] Manual testing performed

---

## 🧩 Checklist — **Required Before Review**

> PRs **will not be reviewed** unless all boxes are checked.

- [ ] I confirm this PR targets the **`develop`** branch  
- [ ] I did **not** open this PR against `master`  
- [ ] My code follows the project’s coding standards  
- [ ] I have added or updated relevant tests  
- [ ] All tests pass locally  
- [ ] I have updated documentation where necessary  
- [ ] There are no breaking changes (or they are documented clearly)  

---

## 🧭 Related Issues / Tickets
Link any related issues or tasks here.

---

## 📝 Additional Notes
Anything else the reviewers should know?
